insight: Committed direction (owner-decided 2026-07-13): shared-world ladder to the global show (Stage 0 server-authoritative command-stream sim -> Stage 1 slice+co-op -> Stage 2 async global show service -> Stage 3 shared space). 2.5D tactical; 3D only Stage 3. Literal-MMO pivot and single-player-only both explicitly rejected. Source of truth: docs/DIRECTION.md

Simulation contract: state must be a pure function of (seed, ordered command log); sim never self-advances on wall time — pluggable clock drivers (paused solo / timed declare-window co-op fields / wall-clock broadcast). apply_command(cmd)->[events]. This is what keeps co-op, spectate, replay, Stage-2 broadcasts reachable. Details: docs/DIRECTION.md technical contract deltas

Full project review (TTRPG defects catalog, conversion analysis, repo assessment, market verdict) lives in docs/review/review-0..4. review-1 findings A1-F10 are the rules-defect catalog the digital rules addendum must answer; fix-first five listed at end of review-1

The TTRPG book has no advancement rules, no universal condition-advancement rule, ambiguous core damage ('usually 1' vs weapons dealing 2-4), uncostable RPM, and unlimited 0-cost actions. These are deliberate digital-addendum decisions, NOT things to infer silently from the book. Canonical digital rulings: docs/rules-addendum.md (drafted overnight 2026-07-13)

Three vocabularies exist and disagree: rulebook docx (Bleed/Crush/Burn/Chill/Poison/Infection + Human/Animal/Robot), char-sheet app constants.js (DMG_TYPES Crush/Bleed/Burn/Shock/Toxic/Psy; RACES Cyborg/Android/...), game repo seed data (matches rulebook). CANONICAL for the game: rulebook conditions + this repo's seed enums. Do not import char-sheet vocab

The live TTRPG campaign's MongoDB export is the canonical content source: 44 skill templates, 28 items, 100 tags, 27 affixes, 3 enemies incl 6-phase tutorial boss Incinedile (Network 50HP surface-immunity design). Char-sheet repo (Galactic-Prime-Time) is the running campaign tool - do not break it; its data seeds this game's SQLite content

wf start adoption is PARTIAL by decision: memory/learn/context/validation/traces + activation block + boot.json receipt YES; 'wf install --packs core,gds' NO (skills already reachable via Workflow repo in session scope; avoids adapter drift). Revisit only if sessions run without the Workflow repo. wf trace/learn need explicit --dir/--file pointing into THIS repo (tools default to the Workflow checkout root)

Session work happens on branch claude/galactic-prime-time-review-kxlelf (push with -u). Descriptive commit messages, no signatures. Owner sleeps overnight sessions: proceed autonomously, queue questions for morning, mark taste-call rulings PROVISIONAL

wf start adoption is PARTIAL by decision: memory/learn/context/validation/traces + activation block + boot.json receipt YES; 'wf install --packs core,gds' NO (skills reachable via Workflow repo in session scope; avoids adapter drift). Revisit only if sessions run without the Workflow repo. CRITICAL: wf tools resolve RELATIVE paths against the Workflow checkout, not cwd — always pass ABSOLUTE --dir/--file/--config into THIS repo (memory check --dir, learn --file, trace --dir, context check --config)

Remote session containers cannot obtain a Godot 4 binary (agent proxy 403s GitHub release downloads and godotengine download hosts; apt ships only godot3, wrong GDScript syntax). Honest validation ladder: gdparse (pip gdtoolkit) for syntax in-container; scripts/run_sim_tests.sh exits 3=SKIP without a binary; real test runs happen on the owner machine or CI with Godot 4.5. Never report GDScript tests as passing from a container without a binary

docs/GPT_Master_Compendium.md is the consolidated design record through ~May 5 (system v0.91, GDD v0.1, boss/modifier/story design, party data). Precedence: DIRECTION.md > rules-addendum.md > compendium > PDFs > rulebook docx. Conflicts with newer live data are catalogued as NQ1-NQ7 in docs/review/review-5-compendium-delta.md + questionnaire section L (biggest: cooldowns 'removed entirely' vs July skill text still using them)

Creation math confirmed: 7 points across Body traits + 7 across Core (party creation stats sum exactly 7+7); psychic resistance threshold verified /15 in app code 2026-07-14 (compendium's 'app uses /10' note is stale). Modifier economy canon (addendum R12): weapon tier gives slots (Crude 0/0..Exceptional 2/2 prefix/suffix) AND gates modifier-tier access; extraction friction scales by tier

Noise/absorption mechanic (compendium GDD v0.1) adopted into DIRECTION: noisy combat pulls nearby encounters into the fight at Clock-reset beats; audience clock and absorption clock can be one system. Anti-grind pillar; KAN-5 implements

Owner rulings: NO cooldowns - skills gate on PRIMING (prep conditions: channels/stacks/stances; high-tier items may skip primes; addendum R3, criterion 9 superseded, engine cooldown code deprecated-dormant until the priming pass). NO party cap - recruitment economy (strong=hard to get, weak=short-lived; arena deployment+exhaustion bound per-fight numbers). Incinedile: 6 phases canon, breach B = 7+ dmg single HIT. Social director north star recorded in DIRECTION: mother-brain LLM emits schema-bound commands, never freewrites state; per-NPC models rejected

Brand paradox RULED intentional: mercy earns the Dissolution songs. Brand = contract; immunity works by EQ LOSS (pragmatic perception, dulled emotions - branded characters should literally read drier game text; presentation-layer dual-prose is the flagship implementation). IP split: party characters are the players' - game inclusion UNDECIDED, don't build premades on them; Nikita+Sasha story is KEEPER content (rebrandable surface, protected story shape). Canon accumulates in docs/story-canon.md

RESOLVED 2026-07-15: Godot IS installable in session containers via the SourceForge mirror (verified): scripts/setup_godot.sh installs 4.5.2-stable from sourceforge.net/projects/godot-engine.mirror (reachable through the proxy; mirror keeps only ~5 recent releases). downloads.godotengine.org is a redirector, not a file host; GitHub release assets remain blocked. KAN-2 suite: 22/22 green under 4.5.2 on first live run. Run tests with: bash scripts/setup_godot.sh && PATH=$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH bash scripts/run_sim_tests.sh

Campaign spine (owner): 'How much can we break your essence down in the name of entertainment?' Floors reach ~20 (design paused at 6). Each floor-SET asks one moral question (necessary/right, safety/justice, self/many); answers unlock path-dependent routes; ending = VERDICT telling the player what person they were and what RULER they'll be. Verdict system = axes + floor-set scoring + unlock graph + verdict function; deliberately separate from tags (audience label vs essence). Canon: docs/story-canon.md

Setting frame RULED 2026-07-16 (DIRECTION D3-D5): the show is a table in the Cosmic Casino (owner novel world), adopted GAME-FIRST - world rules yes, novel story no (Marcus/Viola/third protagonist are examples only, never game content); player character is an OC; NPCs are predesigned characters with arcs (Sasha and Nikita first); dungeon/tables gameplay stays closer to GPT than Day of Ruin - mix and match license. Reality-show skin survives diegetically: a VIP table themed on human pop culture. Patron gods fully DESIGNED same day (Q1-Q8 ruled): two tiers (donator Patrons tier + THE patron god escort), background-driven bidding with ORV only-patronless-choose rule, buy-out = overruling another gods divinity w/ notice of replacement, abandonment = extraction or neglect (never contract exit), multiplier boon economy w/ per-god affection ledgers, epithets via trait-based myth recreation, Forsaken = god-initiated all-in (hardcore opt-in, random offer run 2+, never mid-run). See docs/cosmic-casino-canon.md + docs/design/patron-gods.md

Brand paradox RULED intentional: mercy earns the Dissolution songs. Brand = contract; immunity works by EQ LOSS (pragmatic perception, dulled emotions - branded characters literally read drier game text; dual-prose presentation is the flagship implementation). IP split AMENDED 2026-07-15/16: Sasha and Nikita are RECRUITABLE NPCs, names kept, Look Outside style (found, earned via encounter, permanently losable); the player contestant is an OC created separately; the OTHER players characters stay parked as concepts. Nikita+Sasha story = KEEPER content (protected story shape). Canon: docs/story-canon.md + docs/characters/

A STALE .godot/global_script_class_cache.cfg silently breaks headless class_name resolution for scripts ADDED since the cache was built (parse errors + a hung test runner that times out instead of exiting). scripts/run_sim_tests.sh now re-imports when any .gd under simulation/tests/controller is newer than the cache - keep that guard when touching the script. Symptom to recognize: SCRIPT ERROR Could not find type X in current scope for a class that clearly exists

HypeEngine.credited_actor attributes a victim-subject beat to its producer via a dual emit-order convention: SCHEDULED strikes append action_resolved AFTER their victim beats (scan forward), REACTIONS emit reaction_resolved BEFORE the gore they deal (backward fallback). Safe because reaction and resolve_due are dispatched as separate commands, so their event batches never mix. A victim beat with neither closer (clock-driven bleed) stays correctly uncredited.

hype_goal_completed carries TWO attributions: 'combatant' = the completing event's subject (the maimed victim for takedown/overkill/part_break), and 'completed_by' = HypeEngine._goal_completer, the contestant who actually earned it (credited_actor for those 3 victim-subject kinds, event attribution for the 4 actor-subject kinds incl. body_block=the blocker). I-13 Scene Stealer rides completed_by. The hype LEDGER itself still victim-credits those 3 kinds — that alignment is deferred to attribution-v2 (task #13).

Condition T4 'Death' (crushed/bleeding in data/conditions.json) uses effect ['death'] which condition_engine.gd:567 executes UNCONDITIONALLY — no lethal-part gate (unlike lethal_if_vital at :557). Since both advance_on_clock_reset, a condition on ANY cosmetic limb reaches T4 over 4 Clocks and kills the combatant, contradicting the tier's own 'torso/head only' description and letting the Incinedile die WITHOUT breaching the hidden network (violates the discoverable-win-condition hard rule). Surfaced by the slice playtest driver 2026-07-19; awaiting owner ruling before touching shared combat mechanics.

F2 invariant (condition_engine.gd): death/removal routes ONLY through a lethal, EXPOSED part. Enforced by (a) source gate in apply() — no condition applies to a part hidden behind un-breached surface immunity (condition_resisted reason=surface_immunity); (b) damage_part blocks ALL damage to a hidden part (Resistance.part_blocked_by_surface_immunity → damage_blocked); (c) timer terminals + bare death/death_timer effects gated on _lethal_exposed(part)=lethal AND not hidden. Plus network bleed_immune (mycelium) and bleeding reworked to a systemic tier-scaled bleed_out_drain that skips bleed_immune/hidden/destroyed parts. This is what makes a surface-immunity boss (Incinedile network) killable ONLY via the discovered network. Adversarially verified DRY 2026-07-19.

ForcedAction.default_part / collateral route damage through cond.damage_part to the target's first non-head lethal part — which for a surface-immunity boss is the HIDDEN network. Any NEW code path that calls damage_part or default_part on a boss must respect the surface-immunity gate (damage_part now blocks hidden parts centrally; default_part skips them). This was the 9th and last F2 bypass (round-3 adversarial find).

Per-part resistances/armor are the GENERAL material/prosthetic system, never a special case: a body part carries its own condition_immunities list, optional armor (R14 Robustness buffer), fire_harms, bleed_immune. The mycelium network is just the first example (immune to non-neural conditions, no force resistance, fire harms it, neural poison bypasses). Metal arms, animal parts (KAN-4), cybernetics all use the same part-level data — never invent a bespoke engine exception for a part. Checked in ConditionEngine.apply + the fire-heal hook + R14 Robustness (decision-log #24).
